pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA LS-K-005 (Leadership and Strategy) scores 0.411 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Knowledge Graph Engineer: out_of_scope. Preliminary decision: exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA excluded at Pass 2 (scope: out_of_scope) or Pass 3. No market evidence warrants reversal for Knowledge Graph Engineer.
